name: Prop
description: Environmental props, static objects, destructible items, and interactive props

overrideComponents.comment: Mass in kg for physics simulation

postCreateNotes: Set MeshObject.Object to your prop model
Configure RigidBody mass and physics properties
Set up collision shapes if not auto-generated
Configure interaction prompts for interactive props

variants.name: static
variants.description: Static decorative objects with no physics
postCreateNotes: Set MeshObject.Object to your prop model
Use for trees, rocks, buildings, street furniture, etc

variants.name: destructible
variants.description: Props that can be destroyed or damaged
postCreateNotes: Set MeshObject.Object to intact prop model
Set up destroyed model or removal effect
